milestones.title: Schema + Policy (SSOT kontrat)
notes: layer=L0, core_lock_required=true
CORE_UNLOCK_REASON=PRJ-TEST-QUALITY-GATE F1
acceptance: schema $id=urn:ao:test-quality-rules:v1, additionalProperties=false
acceptance: policy 6 TQ rule, dry-run hatasiz
risk(low/medium): schema kati — detection_method enum custom opsiyonu eklendi

steps.text: Create schemas/test-quality-rules.schema.v1.json with $id urn:ao:test-quality-rules:v1. 6 TQ rule tanımı: rule_id, name, severity, detection_method (semgrep_pattern|semgrep_regex|ast_analysis|heuristic_metric|structural_similarity|custom), pattern_indicators, remediation.

Create policies/policy_test_quality.v1.json with 6 rules: TQ-001 shallow_render(HIGH), TQ-002 tautological(CRITICAL), TQ-003 duplication(HIGH), TQ-004 no_import(HIGH), TQ-005 mock_heavy(MEDIUM), TQ-006 marker_ban(CRITICAL). Thresholds: shallow<0.10, density>=2.0, duplication<0.05.

dod: schemas/test-quality-rules.schema.v1.json olusturuldu, $id ve required fields tamam.
TQ-001=HIGH, TQ-002=CRITICAL, TQ-003=HIGH, TQ-004=HIGH, TQ-005=MEDIUM, TQ-006=CRITICAL.

milestones.title: Semgrep Rules (parser-backed patterns)
notes: layer=L0, core_lock_required=true
codex_consensus: parser-backed patterns (EP-006/007/009), regex OK for EP-008
acceptance: semgrep YAML valid, severity matrix EP-006..EP-009 tanimli
acceptance: positive/negative match dogrulama
risk(medium/low): false positive — v1_advisory basla, baseline sonra strict
risk(low/medium): semgrep JS/TS parser — fallback pattern-regex + path scoping

steps.text: Create ep006_shallow_render_fake.yaml: TQ-001, patterns+pattern-inside+pattern-not-inside, scope *.test.tsx/*.spec.tsx, exclude snapshot/fixture/generated.
Create ep007_tautological_assertion.yaml: TQ-002, two sub-rules: literal-to-literal + toBeDefined-only. Parser-backed.
Create ep008_quality_marker_ban.yaml: TQ-006, pattern-regex (literal signal). Severity ERROR.
Create ep009_data_testid_render_only.yaml: TQ-001 alt-pattern, data-testid render + toBeInTheDocument + zero interaction.
Update severity_matrix.v1.json: default(EP-006=WARN,EP-007=WARN,EP-008=BLOCKED,EP-009=WARN), strict(all BLOCKED).

dod: Severity matrix guncellendi: default ve strict profiller.
EP-008 her iki profilde BLOCKED, digerleri advisory.

milestones.title: CI Gate + Contract Test + Fixtures
notes: layer=L0, core_lock_required=true
codex_consensus: normalized body hash (raw SHA-256 degil)
codex_revision: TQ-004 AST-lite heuristic, TQ-005 mock ratio, --scan-path arg
acceptance: ci script --dry-run exit 0, bad MATCH, good NO MATCH
acceptance: boundary tests shallow=0.10/density=2.0/duplication=0.05
acceptance: normalized hash negatif — farkli testler FARKLI hash
risk(medium/low): near-duplicate kacirir — V2'de AST

steps.text: Create ci/check_test_quality.py (<800 lines): load policy, run semgrep, normalized body hash duplication, TQ-004 filename-vs-import heuristic, TQ-005 mock-ratio, compute metrics, compare thresholds, JSON report. CLI: --repo-root, --scan-path, --policy-path, --out, --dry-run.
Create tests/contract/test_test_quality_gate.py: schema validates policy, CI script output valid, semgrep rules parse, severity matrix entries.
Create 5 smoke fixtures in fixtures/test_quality_smoke/: bad_shallow, bad_tautological, bad_no_import, bad_mock_heavy, good_real.

dod: Normalized body hash: comment strip, whitespace normalize, test title remove.
TQ-004 heuristic: dosya adi vs import listesi karsilastirma.
TQ-005 heuristic: mock_ratio > 0.8 AND real_call_count == 0 → WARNING.
Contract test PASS, script budget PASS.

milestones.title: Agent Rules + AGENT-CODEX.md
notes: layer=L0, core_lock_required=true
codex_consensus: AGENTS.md cross-agent MUST + AGENT-CODEX.md self-audit
acceptance: tests.md NEVER >= 4, test-quality.md userEvent ref
acceptance: AGENTS.md policy ref, AGENT-CODEX.md 5-soru checklist
risk(low): agent rules cok uzun — tests.md < 80, test-quality.md < 60 satir

steps.text: Expand .claude/rules/tests.md: Fake Test Prohibition (MUST) + Test Quality Metrics.
Create .claude/rules/test-quality.md: frontend-specific, globs web/**/*.test.tsx.
Create AGENT-CODEX.md: 5-question self-audit checklist for test quality.
Update AGENTS.md: SSOT router + cross-agent MUST rules.

dod: .claude/rules/tests.md: NEVER shallow render, NEVER tautological, NEVER template copy, EVERY test min 2 assertion.
AGENT-CODEX.md: 5 soruluk self-audit (prod import?, interaction?, tautological?, duplicate?, neden?).

codex_revision: test_quality weight=0.04 (toplam 1.00)
codex_revision: propagation envanteri F5 DoD'sine dahil
codex_revision: severity_matrix sync listesine girmeli

steps.text: Update policy_maturity_assessment.v1.json: add test_quality area (weight=0.04), reduce test_coverage to 0.06.
Update standards.lock: required_files + standard_sources + severity_matrix.

dod: standards.lock: schema, policy, 4 semgrep, ci script, severity_matrix required_files'ta.
Propagation envanteri: tek liste halinde tum artefaktlar.

milestones.title: Cross-Repo Sync + Smoke Gate + Wiring

codex_consensus: post-sync smoke fixture + rule-pack hash
codex_revision: lock_checks.py icine _check_test_quality_standard()
codex_addition: workflow wiring check
risk(medium/high): managed repo semgrep yok — if command guard
risk(low/medium): eski managed repo — if [ -f ] guard

steps.text: Add _check_test_quality_standard() to ci/check_standards_lock_parts/lock_checks.py.
Wire new check in ci/check_standards_lock.py main().
Create fixtures/test_quality_smoke/README.md.
Verify: python3 scripts/sync_managed_repo_standards.py --dry-run lists all new files.

dod: Smoke fixtures: bad + good ornekler fixtures/test_quality_smoke/ altinda.
sync --dry-run propagation listesinde tum yeni dosyalar.
Workflow wiring notu: gate-enforcement-check.yml ci/check_test_quality.py cagirmali.
